package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for ldap_injection_via_string_concat: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: string concatenation or `fmt.Sprintf` building LDAP filter strings with user input
type CaseLdapInjectionViaStringConcatDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseLdapInjectionViaStringConcatModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseLdapInjectionViaStringConcatRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseLdapInjectionViaStringConcatModel
}

type CaseLdapInjectionViaStringConcatService struct {
    repo *CaseLdapInjectionViaStringConcatRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseLdapInjectionViaStringConcatAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveLdapInjectionViaStringConcat(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseLdapInjectionViaStringConcatDTO) error {
    focus := "ldap_injection_via_string_concat"
    _ = focus
    filter := fmt.Sprintf("(uid=%s)", input)
    _ = filter
    ldap_injection_string_concat_positive := map[string]int{"ldap": 1, "injection": 2, "string": 3, "concat": 4}
    ldap_injection_string_concat_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    ldap_positive_0 := ldap_injection_string_concat_positive["ldap"] + len(input)
    _ = ldap_positive_0
    injection_positive_1 := ldap_injection_string_concat_positive["injection"] + len(input)
    _ = injection_positive_1
    string_positive_2 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_positive_2
    concat_positive_3 := ldap_injection_string_concat_positive["concat"] + len(input)
    _ = concat_positive_3
    return nil
}
